stemHtml: Which source provides the most accurate information regarding the presence and intensity of high-level, en-route Clear Air Turbulence (CAT)?

options.a: Reports from other pilots, submitted via PlREPs or SIGMETs.
options.b: Cloud bands seen on satellite images (visual or infra-red).
options.c: Remote sensing from satellites in turbulence mode.
options.d: Echos from on-board WX radar in MAP mode.
